creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jochen Neumeister from comment #1)

Too bad :(

I confirm the Segmentation fault, but... I don't know who fails!

If I tesport -i and then pkg install the generated .txz, something segfaults thrices. However, on my host machine, make stage doesn't fail.

I will investigate further, but do you have any ideas on how to debug this?
